title: KAST Raises $80 Million to Expand Stablecoin Payment Platform
message_html: KAST Raises $80 Million to Expand Stablecoin Payment Platform ...
snippet: Stablecoin payment platform KAST says it has raised $80 million in new funding. The company’s Series A round, announced Monday (March 9), will allow KAST to expand its product, designed to ease cross-border money movement for people and businesses. KAST said this new round of funding is happening as

title: Banks will run RWAs on two blockchain rails, says RedStone co-founder
message_html: Banks will run RWAs on two blockchain rails, says RedStone co-founder ...
snippet: RedStone’s Kaźmierczak says banks are using permissioned networks like Canton for internal workflows while keeping public blockchains like Ethereum for tokenized markets.

title: Qtum's Updated MetaMask Snap Enters Audit Process; Developer Interest Growing for dapp Development
message_html: Qtum's Updated MetaMask Snap Enters Audit Process; Developer Interest Growing for dapp Development ...
snippet: Qtum (@qtum): Our updated MetaMask snap will start the audit process this week. We've already had dev interest for dapp development on Qtum. If you're looking to port an existing dapp or launch a new one, you can get testnet tokens at our faucet: https://testnet-faucet.qtum.info/#!/
